changelogHtml:
Version 1.1.0

December 13, 2018

This is the stable release of AndroidX Test 1.1.0. It contains updates to the following libraries:

  • Espresso 3.1.1
  • Runner 1.1.1
  • Rules 1.1.1
  • Monitor 1.1.
  • AndroidTestOrchestrator 1.1.1
  • Core 1.1.0
  • Truth 1.1.0

  • JUnit 1.1.0

  • Core 1.1.0

    • Make ActivityScenario support activities which start another activity
